title: IBG sandbox landmark candidate intake bridge
intent: Connect vectorizer-sandbox ibg-landmark-candidate.v1 facts to luthiers as governed BodyEvidenceCandidate inputs while preserving provenance, coordinate caveats, confidence labels, and fail-closed review posture. This is a connection/readiness bridge only; it does not promote authoritative geometry, calibrate pixels to millimeters, run the solver, approve IBG memory, or resolve C2 human-approval decisions.
behavior_change: Adds a new IBG-only intake adapter and evidence source for sandbox landmark candidate records. Imported records remain advisory, review-required, blocked by the existing IBG intake gate, and unavailable for solver/export use.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Added EvidenceSource.IBG_SANDBOX_LANDMARK_CANDIDATE and a new sandbox_landmark_candidate_adapter that validates self-contained ibg-landmark-candidate.v1 records, maps their three bout landmarks to centerline-only RAW_PIXEL NormalizedPoint evidence, preserves widths and admissibility facts in candidate metadata, stamps confidence as HEURISTIC using high=0.8 medium=0.5 low=0.3, attaches complete provenance, and runs the existing default IBG intake gate. The solver conversion helper intentionally raises CalibrationRequiredError even when a scale is supplied, keeping pixel facts out of millimeter solver paths until a calibrated follow-up exists. Two number-only sandbox fixture records and focused tests cover success, fail-closed gate posture, provenance preservation, coordinate caveats, offset-body caveats, invalid schema rejection, and review JSON.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: No existing luthiers path accepted vectorizer-sandbox landmark candidate records as governed IBG evidence while preserving their sandbox caveats and preventing accidental authority promotion. This bridge gives CI-RED-015 a concrete connection point to evaluate IBG facts without treating a DXF/export format, sandbox extractor, or file location as authoritative geometry.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=services/api py -3.11 -m pytest services/api/tests/test_ibg_sandbox_landmark_candidate_adapter.py services/api/tests/test_ibg_intake_gate.py services/api/tests/test_ibg_constitutional_integration.py tests/test_ibg_provenance_ratification_docs.py services/api/tests/test_dxf_lifecycle_ibg_provenance_guards.py services/api/tests/test_ibg_export_provenance.py -q -> 71 passed, 2 existing NumPy reload warnings
git diff --cached --check -> clean before first commit
GitHub PR checks initially showed CBSP21 manifest stale and one new test over the complexity threshold; this follow-up updates the manifest and splits the test witness.

files.intent: Register the sandbox landmark candidate as an explicit IBG evidence source.
files.behavior_change: Adds a new enum value only; no existing evidence source behavior changes.

files.intent: Adapt vectorizer-sandbox landmark candidate records into review-required BodyEvidenceCandidate objects with provenance and fail-closed gate results.
files.behavior_change: Adds an opt-in adapter path. Imported sandbox records remain advisory, review-required, not approved for IBG memory, and blocked from solver/export paths.

files.intent: Provide a number-only sandbox fixture with offset-body ordering caveats preserved.
Provide a number-only sandbox fixture for the canonical admissible landmark candidate path.
Cover the sandbox intake bridge, fail-closed posture, provenance preservation, pixel-only coordinate boundary, offset caveats, invalid schema rejection, and review JSON.
Declare the CI-RED-015-L patch scope for CBSP21 manifest gates.
